ActivatedSerial.title: ActivatedSerial
ActivatedSerial.description: Binds a serial key to a specific wireless network name on its first activation.

serial.description: The unique, pre-guaranteed serial number (e.g. DAH-7MD-001)

networkName.description: The custom wireless network name bound to this serial

activatedAt.description: When the serial was first locked and activated

Backup.title: Backup
Backup.description: Complete financial and configuration state backed up automatically.

salesHistory.description: List of all sales transaction records

shops.description: List of all shop accounts and their sub-transactions

distributorName.description: Nominal name of the network distributor

distributorPhone.description: Nominal phone number of the network distributor

pdfFooterNote.description: Optional footer text note shown on PDFs

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last backup operation

/activated_serials/{serial}.description: Tethers valid license serial keys to client network names.

/backups/{serial}.description: Storage for client ledgers and network backups.
